name: Tiffany Product
description: Structure documentation for Tiffany & Co. product data model used in e-commerce and corporate gifting

fields.name: name
fields.description: Full product display name including collection and style

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed product description with materials and design notes

fields.name: subcategory
fields.description: Product subcategory (Rings, Necklaces, Bracelets, Earrings, etc.)

fields.name: collection
fields.description: Tiffany design collection (e.g., Tiffany T, HardWear, Schlumberger)

fields.name: price.amount
fields.description: Retail price in the specified currency

fields.name: gemstones
fields.description: Detailed gemstone specifications (type, carats, color, clarity)

fields.name: giftable
fields.description: Whether available in corporate gifting catalog

fields.name: engravable
fields.description: Whether the item supports personalized engraving

fields.name: occasion
fields.description: Gift occasion categories (Wedding, Anniversary, Corporate Gift, etc.)
